author: Frankie18581
description: Translate selected text, full documents, or use a sidebar panel with AI-powered streaming translation via DeepSeek. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Hermes
manifest.description: Immersive AI translation — inline, full-doc, sidebar, and hover translation powered by DeepSeek, OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Kimi, Qwen, OpenRouter, and custom providers.
manifest.name: Multi Translator

name: Multi Translator

releases.author: Frankie18581
releases.description:
## What changed
- Bumped `minAppVersion` from `1.7.0` → `1.7.2` to match `revealLeaf` API requirement
- This was the last remaining automated review error from 2.0.2

## All Review Fixes (cumulative since 2.0.1)
- ✅ Removed 'Obsidian' from manifest description + added period
- ✅ Removed `detachLeavesOfType` from `onunload`
- ✅ Replaced `createEl('h2'/'h3')` with `Setting().setHeading()`
- ✅ Replaced direct `style.xxx = ` with CSS classes / `setCssProps`
- ✅ Removed unused imports
- ✅ **minAppVersion 1.7.2** for `revealLeaf` API
releases.name: v2.0.3 - Fix minAppVersion for revealLeaf API

releases.author: Frankie18581
releases.description:
## 新功能

- 🎉 支持 8 种 AI 服务商: DeepSeek / OpenAI / Claude / Gemini / Grok / Kimi / Qwen / OpenRouter
- 🔌 一键切换 Provider，自动更新 API 地址和模型列表
- 🎛️ 动态模型选择器，按服务商显示可用模型
- 🔑 各服务商专属 API Key 占位提示
- 🏗️ Claude 原生 Anthropic Messages API 适配（含流式输出）
- 🏗️ Google Gemini OpenAI 兼容端点适配
- 📄 自定义 Provider 支持任意 OpenAI 兼容 API

## 升级注意

旧版 data.json 会自动迁移，无需手动修改。
releases.name: v2.0.0 - Multi-Provider Support
